name: Barclays plc
lede: Barclays runs seven centers across five Indian cities. Noida, Pune, Gurugram, Chennai and Mumbai, covering SSC, GCC/GIC and IT, built over nineteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Barclays office in India. We map seven, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Barclays plc GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Barclays runs 7 verified centers across 5 Indian cities (Noida, Pune, Gurugram, Chennai, Mumbai), covering SSC, GCC/GIC and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: CEO & Head of Investment Banking India

about.description: Barclays's India footprint covers Noida, Pune, Gurugram, Chennai and Mumbai, spanning SSC, GCC/GIC and IT. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 381 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Barclays operate in India?
faq.a: Barclays operates 7 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Barclays have centers in?
faq.a: Barclays's India footprint includes Noida and 4 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Barclays run in India?
faq.a: Barclays runs SSC and 2 additional center types in India.

faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Barclays's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Barclays's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.
